description: Microsoft Word 2010 is open with a raw text chemistry lab report ('Lab_Report_Raw.docx'). Format the document to professional scientific standards by applying subscript formatting to numbers within chemical formulas (C7H6O3, C4H6O3, C9H8O4, C2H4O2, and H2SO4), ensuring quantities and time values remain unsubscripted. Replace all instances of 'deg C' with the degree symbol and C (e.g., 85°C). Format the title on the first line as bold and underlined. Save the final document as 'Documents/Lab_Report_Formatted.docx'.
